creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Adding -lpython2.7 fixed the luxrender build on my system, I can't test within poudriere as I can't get embree to compile. The actual symbol names you list vary from what I get here, but have similar naming.

Either way the undefined references come from libboost_python and the symbols look to be python related. I don't see any reason the openimageio version will effects this.
